text:
Academic Success
Tutoring Resources
Struggling with lower-division coursework or just want to stay ahead? Our tutoring services are here to support all ICS students,
completely free of charge
. Both group and individual tutoring sessions are available. Whether you prefer a collaborative environment or personalized attention, our tutors are ready to help you reach your academic goals. Strengthen your skills and join a community of peers!
Drop-In/Group Tutoring
For students without an appointment or who thrive in a collaborative environment, the ICS tutoring center offers the perfect space to learn and succeed together.
Learn More
Individual Tutoring
For students who prefer one-on-one instruction, our individual tutoring sessions offer tailored support for academic success.
Learn More
Resources
Discover the wide range of resources available within ICS and across UC Irvine to help you thrive academically and beyond.
Learn More
Highly skilled learning assistants who have a passion for supporting fellow students are here to help ICS undergraduates in the ICS Tutoring Center.
– Senior Continuing Lecturer
Shannon Alfaro

No cost. No appointment necessary. Just drop-in!
Need help debugging? Having trouble understanding a concept? Need a place to study where help is readily available? Have a quick question?
Small Group Tutoring is provided by pedagogically-trained ICS undergraduates who have taken & excelled
in these same courses you’re currently taking.
Monday – Friday: 12-5 PM in
ICS2 Room 110
from Week 2 to Week 10 during the Fall, Winter, and Spring quarters.
ICS Courses covered are:
ICS 6B:
Boolean Logic & Logic
ICS 6D:
Discrete Mathematics for Computer Science
ICS 31:
Introduction to Programming
ICS 32:
Programming with Software Libraries
ICS 32H:
Python Programming and Libraries (Accelerated/Honors)
ICS 33:
Intermediate Programming
ICS 45C:
Programming in C/C++ as a Second Language
ICS 45J:
Programming in Java as a Second Language
ICS 46:
Data Structure Implementation and Analysis
ICS 51:
Introduction to Computer Organization
Find a tutor or tutoring center at UCI
The ICS Tutoring Center is on ZotPass
ZotPass is a tool for UCI students to:
* Locate campus-provided tutoring services across disciplines (writing, math, sciences)
* Schedule tutoring appointments
Click here to use ZotPass
From DBHx2
Getting to the ICS Drop-In Tutoring Center from Ring Road near Donald Bren Hall

Individual Focus
Experience the benefits of personalized learning with one-on-one instruction through our individual tutoring sessions. Enhance your understanding and boost your academic performance by working directly with a dedicated tutor. To easily schedule your session, download the
ZotPASS
app today!
Schedule Appointment
